repository.name: OpsConductor
repository.structure: app/(app)/activity/loading.tsx app/(app)/activity/page.tsx app/(app)/agents/loading.tsx app/(app)/agents/new/page.tsx app/(app)/agents/page.tsx app/(app)/agents/[id]/page.tsx app/(app)/approvals/loading.tsx app/(app)/approvals/page.tsx app/(app)/audit/loading.tsx app/(app)/audit/page.tsx app/(app)/cockpit/loading.tsx app/(app)/cockpit/page.tsx app/(app)/integrations/page.tsx app/(app)/layout.tsx app/(app)/settings/page.tsx app/(app)/workflows/page.tsx app/api/agents/[id]/run/route.ts app/api/agents/[id]/status/route.ts app/api/approvals/[id]/review/route.ts app/api/cron/keepalive/route.ts app/api/webhooks/[agentId]/route.ts app/api/workspace/provision/route.ts app/api/workspace/stats/route.ts app/auth/callback/route.ts app/demo/page.tsx app/globals.css app/layout.tsx app/login/page.tsx app/opengraph-image.tsx app/page.tsx app/signup/page.tsx app/sitemap.ts components/activity-feed.tsx components/ui/label.tsx components/ui/menubar.tsx components/ui/navigation-menu.tsx components/ui/pagination.tsx components/ui/popover.tsx components/ui/progress.tsx components/ui/radio-group.tsx repository.file:
import { cn } from "@/lib/utils" function Skeleton({ className }: { className?: string }) { return
} export default function ActivityLoading() { return (
{Array.from({ length: 12 }).map((_, i) => (
))}
) }

import { cn } from "@/lib/utils" function Skeleton({ className }: { className?: string }) { return
} export default function AgentsLoading() { return (
{Array.from({ length: 6 }).map((_, i) => (
))}
) }

"use client" import { useEffect, useState } from "react" import Link from "next/link" import { cn } from "@/lib/utils" import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/client" import { useWorkspace } from "@/lib/hooks/use-workspace" import { AgentStatusDot, AgentStatusLabel } from "@/components/agent-status-dot" import { IntegrationLogo } from "@/components/integration-logo" import { TimeAgo } from "@/components/time-ago" import { SkeletonLoader } from "@/components/skeleton-loader" import { toastSuccess, toastError } from "@/lib/supabase/errors" import { EmptyState } from "@/components/empty-state" import { MoreHorizontal, Plus, LayoutGrid, List, Search, Play, Pause, Bot } from "lucide-react" import type { DbAgent } from "@/lib/types" export default function AgentsPage() { const { workspace } = useWorkspace() const [agents, setAgents] = useState([]) const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true) const [view, setView] = useState<"table" | "card">("table") const [statusFilter, setStatusFilter] = useState("all") const [search, setSearch] = useState("") useEffect(() => { if (!workspace?.id) return const supabase = createClient() async function fetchAgents() { const { data } = await supabase .from('agents') .select('*') .neq('status', 'archived') .order('created_at', { ascending: false }) if (data) setAgents(data) setLoading(false) } fetchAgents() }, [workspace?.id]) async function handleRunNow(agent: DbAgent) { const res = await fetch(`/api/agents/${agent.id}/run`, { method: 'POST' }) if (res.ok) { toastSuccess(`Agent ${agent.name} started`) setAgents(prev => prev.map(a => a.id === agent.id ? { ...a, status: 'running' as const, run_count: a.run_count + 1 } : a)) } else { toastError('Failed to start agent') } } async function handleTogglePause(agent: DbAgent) { const newStatus = agent.status === 'running' ? 'paused' : 'idle' const res = await fetch(`/api/agents/${agent.id}/status`, { method: 'PATCH', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify({ status: newStatus }), }) if (res.ok) { toastSuccess(agent.status === 'running' ? `${agent.name} paused` : `${agent.name} resumed`) setAgents(prev => prev.map(a => a.id === agent.id ? { ...a, status: newStatus as DbAgent['status'] } : a)) } } const filteredAgents = agents .filter(a => statusFilter === "all" || a.status === statusFilter) .filter(a => search === "" || a.name.toLowerCase().includes(search.toLowerCase()) || (a.role || '').toLowerCase().includes(search.toLowerCase())) if (loading) { return
} return (
{/* Header */}

Agents

{agents.length} agents configured

New Agent
{/* Toolbar */}
{["all", "running", "idle", "paused", "error"].map((s) => ( ))}
setSearch(e.target.value)} className="h-8 w-full rounded-md border border-border-base bg-surface-1 pl-8 pr-3 text-[13px] text-text-primary placeholder:text-text-tertiary focus:border-amber focus:outline-none" />
{filteredAgents.length === 0 ? ( ) : view === "table" ? (
{filteredAgents.map((agent) => ( ))}
Status Agent Role Approval Integrations Runs Last Run
{agent.name} {agent.role || '—'} {agent.approval_mode === 'risk_above' ? `> ${agent.approval_threshold}` : agent.approval_mode}
{(agent.integrations || []).slice(0, 4).map((int) => (
))}
{agent.run_count}
{agent.status === 'running' ? ( ) : ( )}
) : (
{filteredAgents.map((agent) => (
{agent.name}

{agent.role || 'Agent'}

{(agent.integrations || []).slice(0, 4).map((int) => (
))}
{agent.run_count} runs
))}
)}
) }

"use client" import { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from "react" import { useRouter } from "next/navigation" import Link from "next/link" import { cn } from "@/lib/utils" import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/client" import { useWorkspace } from "@/lib/hooks/use-workspace" import { useRealtimeAgents } from "@/lib/hooks/use-realtime" import { toastSuccess, toastError } from "@/lib/supabase/errors" import { IntegrationLogo } from "@/components/integration-logo" import { AgentStatusDot } from "@/components/agent-status-dot" import { RiskBadge } from "@/components/risk-badge" import { TimeAgo } from "@/components/time-ago" import { JsonViewer } from "@/components/json-viewer" import type { DbAgent, AgentRun, DbEvent } from "@/lib/types" type Agent = DbAgent type Event = DbEvent import { ArrowLeft, Pause, Play, Trash2, Loader2, Settings, ListChecks, Activity, Zap, } from "lucide-react" const TABS = [ { id: "overview", label: "Overview", icon: Zap }, { id: "runs", label: "Runs", icon: ListChecks }, { id: "events", label: "Events", icon: Activity }, { id: "settings", label: "Settings", icon: Settings }, ] as const type TabId = typeof TABS[number]["id"] export default function AgentDetailPage({ params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }) { const { id: agentId } = require("react").use(params) const router = useRouter() const { workspace } = useWorkspace() const supabase = createClient() const [agent, setAgent] = useState(null) const [runs, setRuns] = useState([]) const [events, setEvents] = useState([]) const [tab, setTab] = useState("overview") const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true) const [acting, setActing] = useState(false) const [editName, setEditName] = useState("") const [editDescription, setEditDescription] = useState("") const [editRole, setEditRole] = useState("") const [editModel, setEditModel] = useState("") const [editApprovalMode, setEditApprovalMode] = useState("always") const [editPrompt, setEditPrompt] = useState("") const [settingsSaving, setSettingsSaving] = useState(false) const fetchAgent = useCallback(async () => { const { data } = await supabase .from('agents') .select('*') .eq('id', agentId) .single() if (data) { setAgent(data as Agent) setEditName(data.name) setEditDescription(data.description || "") setEditRole(data.role || "") setEditModel(data.model || "claude-sonnet-4-6") setEditApprovalMode(data.approval_mode || "always") setEditPrompt(data.system_prompt || "") } setLoading(false) }, [agentId, supabase]) const fetchRuns = useCallback(async () => { const { data } = await supabase .from('agent_runs') .select('*') .eq('agent_id', agentId) .order('started_at', { ascending: false }) .limit(50) if (data) setRuns(data as AgentRun[]) }, [agentId, supabase]) const fetchEvents = useCallback(async () => { const { data } = await supabase .from('events') .select('*') .eq('agent_id', agentId) .order('created_at', { ascending: false }) .limit(50) if (data) setEvents(data as Event[]) }, [agentId, supabase]) useEffect(() => { fetchAgent() fetchRuns() fetchEvents() }, [fetchAgent, fetchRuns, fetchEvents]) useRealtimeAgents(workspace?.id, () => fetchAgent()) async function runNow() { if (!agent || !workspace) return setActing(true) const { error } = await supabase.from('agent_runs').insert({ agent_id: agent.id, workspace_id: workspace.id, status: 'running', triggered_by: 'manual', started_at: new Date().toISOString(), }) if (!error) { await supabase.from('agents').update({ status: 'running', last_run_at: new Date().toISOString() }).eq('id', agent.id) toastSuccess(`${agent.name} started`) fetchAgent() fetchRuns() } else toastError(error) setActing(false) } async function togglePause() { if (!agent) return setActing(true) const next = agent.status === 'paused' ? 'idle' : 'paused' const { error } = await supabase.from('agents').update({ status: next }).eq('id', agent.id) if (!error) { toastSuccess(`${agent.name} ${next === 'paused' ? 'paused' : 'resumed'}`) fetchAgent() } else toastError(error) setActing(false) } async function archiveAgent() { if (!agent) return if (!confirm('Archive this agent? This cannot be undone.')) return setActing(true) const { error } = await supabase.from('agents').update({ status: 'archived' }).eq('id', agent.id) if (!error) { toastSuccess(`${agent.name} archived`) router.push('/agents') } else toastError(error) setActing(false) } async function saveSettings(e: React.FormEvent) { e.preventDefault() if (!agent) return setSettingsSaving(true) const { error } = await supabase.from('agents').update({ name: editName.trim(), description: editDescription.trim() || null, role: editRole.trim() || null, model: editModel, approval_mode: editApprovalMode, system_prompt: editPrompt.trim() || null, }).eq('id', agent.id) setSettingsSaving(false) if (!error) { toastSuccess('Agent settings saved') fetchAgent() } else toastError(error) } if (loading) return (
) if (!agent) return (

Agent not found

Back to Agents
) const totalRuns = runs.length const successRuns = runs.filter(r => r.status === 'success').length const successRate = totalRuns > 0 ? Math.round((successRuns / totalRuns) * 100) : 0 return (
Back to Agents

{agent.name}

{agent.description || agent.role || 'No description'}

{agent.status !== 'archived' && ( <> )}
{TABS.map(t => ( ))}
{tab === 'overview' && (
Total Runs
{totalRuns}
Success Rate
{successRate}%
Last Run
{agent.last_run_at ? : 'Never'}

Details

Model{agent.model}
Trigger{agent.trigger_type}
Approval Mode{(agent.approval_mode || 'always').replace('_', ' ')}
Status{agent.status}
Created
{agent.integrations && (
Integrations{(agent.integrations as string[]).join(', ')}
)}

Recent Runs

{runs.slice(0, 5).length === 0 ? (

No runs yet

) : (
{runs.slice(0, 5).map(run => (
{run.status} • {run.triggered_by}
{run.duration_ms && {(run.duration_ms / 1000).toFixed(1)}s}
))}
)} {runs.length > 5 && ( )}
)} {tab === 'runs' && (
{runs.length === 0 ? ( ) : runs.map(run => ( ))}
Status Trigger Duration Actions Cost Started
No runs recorded
{run.status} {run.triggered_by} {run.duration_ms ? `${(run.duration_ms / 1000).toFixed(1)}s` : '—'} {run.action_count ?? '—'} {run.cost_usd ? `$${run.cost_usd.toFixed(4)}` : '—'}
)} {tab === 'events' && (
{events.length === 0 ? (
No events recorded for this agent
) : (
{events.map(evt => (
{evt.integration && } {evt.title || evt.type} {evt.risk_level && }
{evt.payload &&
}
))}
)}
)} {tab === 'settings' && (
Agent Settings
setEditName(e.target.value)} required className="h-9 w-full rounded-md border border-border-base bg-surface-1 px-3 text-[13px] text-text-primary focus:border-amber focus:outline-none" />

import { cn } from "@/lib/utils" function Skeleton({ className }: { className?: string }) { return
} export default function ApprovalsLoading() { return (
{Array.from({ length: 4 }).map((_, i) => ( ))}
{Array.from({ length: 5 }).map((_, i) => (
))}
) }

import { cn } from "@/lib/utils" function Skeleton({ className }: { className?: string }) { return
} export default function CockpitLoading() { return (
{/* Header */}
{/* Stat cards */}
{Array.from({ length: 4 }).map((_, i) => (
))}
{/* Activity + Agents */}
{Array.from({ length: 8 }).map((_, i) => (
))}
{Array.from({ length: 5 }).map((_, i) => (
))}
{/* Approval preview */}
{Array.from({ length: 3 }).map((_, i) => (
))}
) }

import { CockpitStats } from "@/components/cockpit-stats" import { ActivityFeed } from "@/components/activity-feed" import { AgentStatusPanel } from "@/components/agent-status-panel" import { ApprovalPreview } from "@/components/approval-preview" export default function CockpitPage() { return (
{/* Page header */}

Cockpit

Your AI operations at a glance

{/* Stat cards */} {/* Middle section — Activity + Agent Status */}
{/* Approval preview */}
) }

import { AppSidebar } from "@/components/app-sidebar" import { CommandPalette } from "@/components/command-palette" import { NotificationBell } from "@/components/notification-bell" import { WorkspaceProvider } from "@/lib/hooks/use-workspace" import { Toaster } from "sonner" export default function AppLayout({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) { return (
{/* Top bar with notification bell */}
⌘K
{children}
) }

"use client" import { Workflow, Calendar } from "lucide-react" export default function WorkflowsPage() { const templates = [ { name: "Lead Follow-Up", description: "Automatically follow up with new leads who download content or fill out forms", apps: ["HubSpot", "Gmail"], timeSaved: "4 hrs/week" }, { name: "Churn Early Warning", description: "Detect at-risk accounts based on usage drops and initiate rescue sequences", apps: ["Stripe", "HubSpot", "Gmail"], timeSaved: "6 hrs/week" }, { name: "Invoice Recovery", description: "Send polite payment reminders for overdue invoices on a graduated schedule", apps: ["Stripe", "Gmail"], timeSaved: "3 hrs/week" }, { name: "New User Welcome", description: "Onboard new signups with personalized welcome messages and resource links", apps: ["Slack", "Notion", "Gmail"], timeSaved: "2 hrs/week" }, { name: "Deal Stage Nudge", description: "Prompt sales reps when deals stall at a specific stage for too long", apps: ["HubSpot", "Slack"], timeSaved: "3 hrs/week" }, { name: "Slack Digest", description: "Post a daily summary of all agent activity to a designated Slack channel", apps: ["Slack"], timeSaved: "1 hr/week" }, ] return (
{/* Header */}

Workflows

Pre-built and custom workflow templates for your agents

{/* Coming soon banner */}
Visual workflow builder shipping Q2 2026
{/* Template Gallery */}

Template Gallery

{templates.map((template) => (

{template.name}

{template.description}

{template.apps.map((app) => ( {app} ))}
{template.timeSaved}
))}
) }

{ "$schema": "https://ui.shadcn.com/schema.json", "style": "new-york", "rsc": true, "tsx": true, "tailwind": { "config": "", "css": "app/globals.css", "baseColor": "neutral", "cssVariables": true, "prefix": "" }, "aliases": { "components": "@/components", "utils": "@/lib/utils", "ui": "@/components/ui", "lib": "@/lib", "hooks": "@/hooks" }, "iconLibrary": "lucide" }

// OpsConductor Mock Data for v1
export type AgentStatus = "running" | "idle" | "paused" | "error" export type ApprovalStatus = "pending" | "approved" | "rejected" | "auto-executed" export type RiskLevel = "low" | "medium" | "high" export type EventStatus = "success" | "failed" | "pending" | "running"
export interface Agent { id: string name: string role: string status: AgentStatus connectedApps: string[] actionsThisWeek: number costThisMonth: number lastActive: string createdAt: string totalActions: number totalCost: number sparklineData: number[] nextAction?: string nextActionTime?: string }
export interface Approval { id: string agentId: string agentName: string agentRole: string riskLevel: RiskLevel status: ApprovalStatus actionDescription: string draftContent?: string draftSubject?: string targetEntity: string targetType: string timestamp: string app: string }
export interface ActivityEvent { id: string agentId: string agentName: string app: string action: string target: string status: EventStatus cost: number timestamp: string reasoning?: string }
export interface Integration { id: string name: string icon: string category: string connected: boolean status?: "live" | "expiring" | "disconnected" lastSynced?: string agentCount?: number }
export const agents: Agent[] = [ { id: "agent-1", name: "Lead Nurturer", role: "Lead Nurturer", status: "running", connectedApps: ["HubSpot", "Gmail", "Slack"], actionsThisWeek: 47, costThisMonth: 2.34, lastActive: "2 min ago", createdAt: "2026-01-15", totalActions: 1284, totalCost: 18.92, sparklineData: [5, 8, 12, 7, 9, 15, 11], nextAction: "Follow up with Sarah Chen", nextActionTime: "In 2 hours", }, { id: "agent-2", name: "Churn Rescue", role: "Churn Rescue", status: "running", connectedApps: ["Stripe", "HubSpot", "Gmail"], actionsThisWeek: 23, costThisMonth: 1.87, lastActive: "15 min ago", createdAt: "2026-01-20", totalActions: 567, totalCost: 9.45, sparklineData: [3, 5, 2, 8, 4, 6, 3], nextAction: "Check Acme Corp usage", nextActionTime: "In 45 min", }, { id: "agent-3", name: "Invoice Chaser", role: "Invoice Chaser", status: "idle", connectedApps: ["Stripe", "Gmail", "Slack"], actionsThisWeek: 8, costThisMonth: 0.56, lastActive: "3 hours ago", createdAt: "2026-02-01", totalActions: 234, totalCost: 4.12, sparklineData: [1, 2, 1, 0, 3, 1, 0], nextAction: "Send reminder to Globex", nextActionTime: "Tomorrow 9am", }, { id: "agent-4", name: "Welcome Bot", role: "New User Welcome", status: "paused", connectedApps: ["Slack", "Notion"], actionsThisWeek: 0, costThisMonth: 0, lastActive: "2 days ago", createdAt: "2026-02-10", totalActions: 89, totalCost: 1.23, sparklineData: [4, 2, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0], }, { id: "agent-5", name: "Deal Nudger", role: "Deal Stage Nudge", status: "error", connectedApps: ["HubSpot", "Slack"], actionsThisWeek: 3, costThisMonth: 0.12, lastActive: "1 hour ago", createdAt: "2026-02-15", totalActions: 156, totalCost: 2.78, sparklineData: [2, 4, 6, 3, 1, 0, 3], }, { id: "agent-6", name: "Content Writer", role: "Content Generation", status: "running", connectedApps: ["Notion", "Slack", "Gmail"], actionsThisWeek: 31, costThisMonth: 1.95, lastActive: "8 min ago", createdAt: "2026-01-25", totalActions: 892, totalCost: 14.56, sparklineData: [6, 4, 8, 10, 6, 7, 5], nextAction: "Draft blog post outline", nextActionTime: "In 1 hour", }, { id: "agent-7", name: "Data Enricher", role: "Data Enrichment", status: "running", connectedApps: ["HubSpot", "Clearbit", "Slack"], actionsThisWeek: 56, costThisMonth: 3.12, lastActive: "1 min ago", createdAt: "2026-02-05", totalActions: 2341, totalCost: 22.30, sparklineData: [8, 12, 9, 14, 11, 8, 13], nextAction: "Enrich new contacts from HubSpot", nextActionTime: "In 15 min", }, { id: "agent-8", name: "Meeting Scheduler", role: "Calendar Management", status: "idle", connectedApps: ["Google Calendar", "Gmail", "HubSpot"], actionsThisWeek: 12, costThisMonth: 0.78, lastActive: "45 min ago", createdAt: "2026-02-12", totalActions: 445, totalCost: 5.89, sparklineData: [2, 3, 1, 4, 2, 3, 1], nextAction: "Schedule demo with TechCorp", nextActionTime: "Tomorrow 2pm", }, ]
export const pendingApprovals: Approval[] = [ { id: "appr-1", agentId: "agent-1", agentName: "Lead Nurturer", agentRole: "Lead Nurturer", riskLevel: "medium", status: "pending", actionDescription: "Ready to send a personalized follow-up email to Sarah Chen at Acme Corp, who downloaded our whitepaper 3 days ago", draftSubject: "Quick thought on your AI operations, Sarah", draftContent: "Hi Sarah,

I noticed you grabbed our guide on scaling AI agents. Most teams we work with find that the hardest part isn't the AI itself — it's the approval bottleneck.

Would 15 minutes this week work to show you how we've solved that?

Best,
The OpsConductor Team", targetEntity: "Sarah Chen, Acme Corp", targetType: "contact", timestamp: "5 min ago", app: "Gmail", }, { id: "appr-2", agentId: "agent-2", agentName: "Churn Rescue", agentRole: "Churn Rescue", riskLevel: "high", status: "pending", actionDescription: "Ready to send a 20% discount offer to Globex Inc, who has been inactive for 60 days and has a $4,800 ARR contract", draftSubject: "We miss you, Globex. Here's 20% off.", draftContent: "Hi team,

We noticed your usage has dropped significantly. We'd love to understand what changed and help get you back on track.

As a gesture, we're offering 20% off your next renewal.

Let's chat?", targetEntity: "Globex Inc", targetType: "company", timestamp: "12 min ago", app: "Gmail", }, { id: "appr-3", agentId: "agent-3", agentName: "Invoice Chaser", agentRole: "Invoice Chaser", riskLevel: "low", status: "pending", actionDescription: "Ready to send a friendly payment reminder for Invoice #INV-2847 ($1,200) to Initech, overdue by 7 days", draftSubject: "Friendly reminder: Invoice #INV-2847", draftContent: "Hi there,

Just a quick reminder that Invoice #INV-2847 for $1,200 was due last week. If you've already sent payment, please disregard this note.

Thanks!", targetEntity: "Initech, Invoice #INV-2847", targetType: "invoice", timestamp: "28 min ago", app: "Gmail", }, { id: "appr-4", agentId: "agent-6", agentName: "Content Writer", agentRole: "Content Generation", riskLevel: "medium", status: "pending", actionDescription: "Ready to publish draft blog post 'AI Agents in RevOps: A Practical Guide' to Notion workspace", draftSubject: "AI Agents in RevOps: A Practical Guide", draftContent: "# AI Agents in RevOps

Revenue operations teams are discovering that AI agents can automate repetitive tasks while keeping humans in the loop for high-stakes decisions...", targetEntity: "Notion — Blog Workspace", targetType: "document", timestamp: "18 min ago", app: "Notion", }, { id: "appr-5", agentId: "agent-7", agentName: "Data Enricher", agentRole: "Data Enrichment", riskLevel: "high", status: "pending", actionDescription: "Wants to update 47 HubSpot contacts with enriched company data from Clearbit — includes revenue and employee count fields", targetEntity: "47 HubSpot Contacts", targetType: "bulk-update", timestamp: "6 min ago", app: "HubSpot", }, ]
export const recentApprovals: Approval[] = [ { id: "appr-10", agentId: "agent-1", agentName: "Lead Nurturer", agentRole: "Lead Nurturer", riskLevel: "low", status: "approved", actionDescription: "Sent welcome email to Marcus Webb after HubSpot form submission", targetEntity: "Marcus Webb", targetType: "contact", timestamp: "1 hour ago", app: "Gmail", }, { id: "appr-11", agentId: "agent-2", agentName: "Churn Rescue", agentRole: "Churn Rescue", riskLevel: "medium", status: "rejected", actionDescription: "Proposed Slack message to #sales about at-risk account Vandelay Industries", targetEntity: "Vandelay Industries", targetType: "company", timestamp: "2 hours ago", app: "Slack", }, { id: "appr-12", agentId: "agent-1", agentName: "Lead Nurturer", agentRole: "Lead Nurturer", riskLevel: "low", status: "auto-executed", actionDescription: "Updated HubSpot contact stage for Priya Sharma to 'Engaged'", targetEntity: "Priya Sharma", targetType: "contact", timestamp: "3 hours ago", app: "HubSpot", }, { id: "appr-13", agentId: "agent-8", agentName: "Meeting Scheduler", agentRole: "Calendar Management", riskLevel: "low", status: "approved", actionDescription: "Scheduled 30-minute demo call with Raj Patel from TechCorp via Google Calendar", targetEntity: "Raj Patel, TechCorp", targetType: "meeting", timestamp: "4 hours ago", app: "Google Calendar", }, { id: "appr-14", agentId: "agent-6", agentName: "Content Writer", agentRole: "Content Generation", riskLevel: "low", status: "auto-executed", actionDescription: "Created draft outline for Q2 product update email", targetEntity: "Notion — Drafts", targetType: "document", timestamp: "5 hours ago", app: "Notion", }, { id: "appr-15", agentId: "agent-7", agentName: "Data Enricher", agentRole: "Data Enrichment", riskLevel: "medium", status: "approved", actionDescription: "Enriched 23 new contacts with Clearbit company data and updated HubSpot records", targetEntity: "23 HubSpot Contacts", targetType: "bulk-update", timestamp: "6 hours ago", app: "HubSpot", }, ]
export const activityEvents: ActivityEvent[] = [ { id: "evt-1", agentId: "agent-1", agentName: "Lead Nurturer", app: "HubSpot", action: "Checked for new trial signups", target: "HubSpot Contacts", status: "success", cost: 0.001, timestamp: "2 min ago", reasoning: "Agent checked HubSpot for contacts in Trial stage inactive > 5 days. Found 3 contacts. Queued follow-up emails for Sarah Chen, Marcus Webb, Priya Sharma.", }, { id: "evt-2", agentId: "agent-2", agentName: "Churn Rescue", app: "Stripe", action: "Detected MRR drop for Globex Inc", target: "Globex Inc", status: "success", cost: 0.002, timestamp: "12 min ago", reasoning: "Detected 35% usage drop for Globex Inc over 30 days. Flagged as high churn risk. Queued discount offer for approval.", }, { id: "evt-3", agentId: "agent-1", agentName: "Lead Nurturer", app: "Gmail", action: "Sent follow-up email", target: "Marcus Webb", status: "success", cost: 0.003, timestamp: "1 hour ago", }, { id: "evt-4", agentId: "agent-3", agentName: "Invoice Chaser", app: "Stripe", action: "Checked overdue invoices", target: "Stripe Invoices", status: "success", cost: 0.001, timestamp: "3 hours ago", reasoning: "Queried Stripe for invoices overdue > 7 days. Found 1 invoice: #INV-2847 for Initech ($1,200). Queued payment reminder.", }, { id: "evt-5", agentId: "agent-5", agentName: "Deal Nudger", app: "HubSpot", action: "Failed to update deal stage", target: "Vandelay Industries Deal", status: "failed", cost: 0.001, timestamp: "1 hour ago", reasoning: "Attempted to update deal stage from 'Proposal' to 'Negotiation'. HubSpot API returned 403 Forbidden. OAuth token may have expired.", }, { id: "evt-6", agentId: "agent-2", agentName: "Churn Rescue", app: "HubSpot", action: "Updated contact risk score", target: "Acme Corp", status: "success", cost: 0.001, timestamp: "2 hours ago", }, { id: "evt-7", agentId: "agent-1", agentName: "Lead Nurturer", app: "Slack", action: "Posted daily lead summary to #sales", target: "#sales channel", status: "success", cost: 0.002, timestamp: "4 hours ago", }, { id: "evt-8", agentId: "agent-1", agentName: "Lead Nurturer", app: "HubSpot", action: "Updated contact stage to Engaged", target: "Priya Sharma", status: "success", cost: 0.001, timestamp: "5 hours ago", }, { id: "evt-9", agentId: "agent-2", agentName: "Churn Rescue", app: "Gmail", action: "Sent check-in email", target: "Soylent Corp", status: "success", cost: 0.003, timestamp: "6 hours ago", }, { id: "evt-10", agentId: "agent-3", agentName: "Invoice Chaser", app: "Gmail", action: "Sent payment reminder", target: "Hooli, Invoice #INV-2801", status: "success", cost: 0.003, timestamp: "Yesterday", }, { id: "evt-11", agentId: "agent-7", agentName: "Data Enricher", app: "HubSpot", action: "Enriched 12 new contacts with Clearbit data", target: "HubSpot Contacts", status: "success", cost: 0.024, timestamp: "25 min ago", reasoning: "Detected 12 new contacts without enrichment data. Queried Clearbit for firmographic info. Successfully enriched all 12 records.", }, { id: "evt-12", agentId: "agent-6", agentName: "Content Writer", app: "Notion", action: "Created blog post draft", target: "AI Agents in RevOps: A Practical Guide", status: "success", cost: 0.018, timestamp: "35 min ago", reasoning: "Generated a 1,200-word blog post draft based on Q2 content calendar. Used product positioning docs and competitor analysis as context.", }, { id: "evt-13", agentId: "agent-8", agentName: "Meeting Scheduler", app: "Google Calendar", action: "Scheduled demo call", target: "Raj Patel, TechCorp", status: "success", cost: 0.002, timestamp: "45 min ago", reasoning: "Found mutual availability between sales rep and prospect. Booked 30-min Zoom call for Thursday at 2pm EST.", }, { id: "evt-14", agentId: "agent-7", agentName: "Data Enricher", app: "Clearbit", action: "Resolved company domain for new lead", target: "jennifer.wu@nexatech.io", status: "success", cost: 0.003, timestamp: "52 min ago", }, { id: "evt-15", agentId: "agent-1", agentName: "Lead Nurturer", app: "HubSpot", action: "Moved lead to MQL stage", target: "David Park, Synthwave Labs", status: "success", cost: 0.001, timestamp: "1 hour ago", reasoning: "Lead scoring threshold crossed after 3 website visits and whitepaper download. Updated lifecycle stage from Lead to MQL.", }, { id: "evt-16", agentId: "agent-6", agentName: "Content Writer", app: "Slack", action: "Shared content calendar update", target: "#marketing channel", status: "success", cost: 0.001, timestamp: "1.5 hours ago", }, { id: "evt-17", agentId: "agent-2", agentName: "Churn Rescue", app: "Stripe", action: "Detected failed payment", target: "Initech — Invoice #INV-3021", status: "success", cost: 0.001, timestamp: "2 hours ago", reasoning: "Stripe webhook indicated failed payment. Card on file expired. Flagged for follow-up and queued dunning email.", }, { id: "evt-18", agentId: "agent-8", agentName: "Meeting Scheduler", app: "Gmail", action: "Sent meeting confirmation", target: "Lisa Huang, CloudFirst", status: "success", cost: 0.002, timestamp: "2 hours ago", }, { id: "evt-19", agentId: "agent-1", agentName: "Lead Nurturer", app: "Gmail", action: "Sent personalized case study", target: "Tom Anderson, Blueshift Inc", status: "success", cost: 0.004, timestamp: "2.5 hours ago", reasoning: "Contact visited pricing page 3 times. Selected the RevOps case study based on industry match (SaaS) and sent personalized email.", }, { id: "evt-20", agentId: "agent-7", agentName: "Data Enricher", app: "HubSpot", action: "Updated company revenue data", target: "Acme Corp", status: "success", cost: 0.002, timestamp: "3 hours ago", }, { id: "evt-21", agentId: "agent-3", agentName: "Invoice Chaser", app: "Slack", action: "Notified finance team of overdue invoice", target: "#finance — Globex Invoice #INV-2990", status: "success", cost: 0.001, timestamp: "3 hours ago", reasoning: "Invoice #INV-2990 ($3,400) is 14 days overdue. Escalated to #finance per rules (>10 days overdue).", }, { id: "evt-22", agentId: "agent-6", agentName: "Content Writer", app: "Notion", action: "Updated product changelog", target: "Notion — Product Updates", status: "success", cost: 0.008, timestamp: "3.5 hours ago", }, { id: "evt-23", agentId: "agent-2", agentName: "Churn Rescue", app: "Slack", action: "Posted weekly churn risk report", target: "#cs-alerts channel", status: "success", cost: 0.004, timestamp: "4 hours ago", reasoning: "Weekly report. 4 accounts with >25% usage drop MoM: Globex Inc, Soylent Corp, Massive Dynamic, Wayne Enterprises.", }, { id: "evt-24", agentId: "agent-1", agentName: "Lead Nurturer", app: "HubSpot", action: "Created new deal", target: "NexaTech — Enterprise Pilot", status: "success", cost: 0.002, timestamp: "4 hours ago", }, { id: "evt-25", agentId: "agent-8", agentName: "Meeting Scheduler", app: "Google Calendar", action: "Rescheduled meeting", target: "Demo with Acme Corp", status: "success", cost: 0.001, timestamp: "5 hours ago", reasoning: "Acme Corp requested reschedule via email. Found next available slot and sent updated calendar invite.", }, { id: "evt-26", agentId: "agent-7", agentName: "Data Enricher", app: "Clearbit", action: "Bulk enrichment job completed", target: "23 new contacts", status: "success", cost: 0.046, timestamp: "6 hours ago", reasoning: "23/23 contacts enriched. Added company size, industry, revenue range, and social profiles.", }, { id: "evt-27", agentId: "agent-5", agentName: "Deal Nudger", app: "Slack", action: "Sent stale deal alert", target: "#sales — Pied Piper deal stale 15 days", status: "success", cost: 0.001, timestamp: "6 hours ago", }, { id: "evt-28", agentId: "agent-3", agentName: "Invoice Chaser", app: "Stripe", action: "Verified payment received", target: "Cyberdyne Systems, Invoice #INV-2756", status: "success", cost: 0.001, timestamp: "7 hours ago", reasoning: "Payment of $2,850 confirmed via Stripe webhook. Marked invoice as paid. Sent thank-you confirmation.", }, { id: "evt-29", agentId: "agent-6", agentName: "Content Writer", app: "Gmail", action: "Drafted customer success email", target: "Quarterly review — Wayne Enterprises", status: "success", cost: 0.006, timestamp: "8 hours ago", }, { id: "evt-30", agentId: "agent-2", agentName: "Churn Rescue", app: "HubSpot", action: "Updated NPS risk indicators", target: "14 accounts scored", status: "success", cost: 0.003, timestamp: "9 hours ago", reasoning: "Processed NPS survey responses. 14 accounts scored. 3 flagged as detractors (score < 7). Queued personalized outreach.", }, { id: "evt-31", agentId: "agent-8", agentName: "Meeting Scheduler", app: "Gmail", action: "Sent meeting prep briefing", target: "Sales team — Globex Inc meeting", status: "success", cost: 0.005, timestamp: "10 hours ago", reasoning: "Compiled account context: recent support tickets, product usage, renewal date, and stakeholder map.", }, { id: "evt-32", agentId: "agent-1", agentName: "Lead Nurturer", app: "HubSpot", action: "Imported webinar attendees", target: "42 new leads from Q2 webinar", status: "success", cost: 0.008, timestamp: "Yesterday", reasoning: "Imported 42 attendees from 'Scaling AI Ops' webinar. Created contacts, tagged source, and queued follow-up sequences.", }, { id: "evt-33", agentId: "agent-7", agentName: "Data Enricher", app: "HubSpot", action: "Deduplicated contact records", target: "8 duplicate contacts merged", status: "success", cost: 0.003, timestamp: "Yesterday", }, { id: "evt-34", agentId: "agent-5", agentName: "Deal Nudger", app: "HubSpot", action: "Updated deal forecast", target: "Q2 pipeline — $142K weighted", status: "success", cost: 0.002, timestamp: "Yesterday", reasoning: "Recalculated Q2 forecast based on deal stage probabilities and activity signals. Total weighted pipeline: $142K across 8 deals.", }, { id: "evt-35", agentId: "agent-3", agentName: "Invoice Chaser", app: "Gmail", action: "Sent final payment notice", target: "Massive Dynamic, Invoice #INV-2688", status: "success", cost: 0.003, timestamp: "Yesterday", reasoning: "Invoice #INV-2688 ($5,200) is 28 days overdue. Sent final notice. Next step: flag for collections if no response in 72 hours.", }, ]
export const integrations: Integration[] = [ { id: "int-1", name: "Gmail", icon: "Mail", category: "Email", connected: true, status: "live", lastSynced: "2 min ago", agentCount: 3 }, { id: "int-2", name: "HubSpot", icon: "BarChart3", category: "CRM", connected: true, status: "live", lastSynced: "5 min ago", agentCount: 3 }, { id: "int-3", name: "Stripe", icon: "CreditCard", category: "Finance", connected: true, status: "live", lastSynced: "12 min ago", agentCount: 2 }, { id: "int-4", name: "Slack", icon: "MessageSquare", category: "Messaging", connected: true, status: "live", lastSynced: "1 min ago", agentCount: 4 }, { id: "int-5", name: "Notion", icon: "FileText", category: "Productivity", connected: true, status: "expiring", lastSynced: "1 hour ago", agentCount: 1 }, { id: "int-6", name: "Clearbit", icon: "Search", category: "Enrichment", connected: true, status: "live", lastSynced: "30 min ago", agentCount: 1 }, { id: "int-7", name: "Google Calendar", icon: "Calendar", category: "Calendar", connected: true, status: "live", lastSynced: "15 min ago", agentCount: 1 }, { id: "int-8", name: "Salesforce", icon: "Cloud", category: "CRM", connected: false }, { id: "int-9", name: "Outlook", icon: "Mail", category: "Email", connected: false }, { id: "int-10", name: "Teams", icon: "MessageSquare", category: "Messaging", connected: false }, { id: "int-11", name: "QuickBooks", icon: "Calculator", category: "Finance", connected: false }, { id: "int-12", name: "Airtable", icon: "Table", category: "Productivity", connected: false }, { id: "int-13", name: "Google Sheets", icon: "Sheet", category: "Productivity", connected: false }, { id: "int-14", name: "Calendly", icon: "CalendarClock", category: "Calendar", connected: false }, { id: "int-15", name: "Jira", icon: "Kanban", category: "Project Management", connected: false }, { id: "int-16", name: "Linear", icon: "Layers", category: "Project Management", connected: false }, ]
export const cockpitStats = { totalActionsThisWeek: 180, actionsTrend: +18, revenueInfluenced: 28750, pendingApprovals: 5, agentCostThisMonth: 10.74, }

{ "name": "my-project", "version": "0.1.0", "private": true, "scripts": { "dev": "next dev", "build": "next build", "start": "next start", "lint": "eslint ." }, "dependencies": { "@hookform/resolvers": "^3.9.1", "@radix-ui/react-accordion": "1.2.12", "@radix-ui/react-alert-dialog": "1.1.15", "@radix-ui/react-aspect-ratio": "1.1.8", "@radix-ui/react-avatar": "1.1.11", "@radix-ui/react-checkbox": "1.3.3", "@radix-ui/react-collapsible": "1.1.12", "@radix-ui/react-context-menu": "2.2.16", "@radix-ui/react-dialog": "1.1.15", "@radix-ui/react-dropdown-menu": "2.1.16", "@radix-ui/react-hover-card": "1.1.15", "@radix-ui/react-label": "2.1.8", "@radix-ui/react-menubar": "1.1.16", "@radix-ui/react-navigation-menu": "1.2.14", "@radix-ui/react-popover": "1.1.15", "@radix-ui/react-progress": "1.1.8", "@radix-ui/react-radio-group": "1.3.8", "@radix-ui/react-scroll-area": "1.2.10", "@radix-ui/react-select": "2.2.6", "@radix-ui/react-separator": "1.1.8", "@radix-ui/react-slider": "1.3.6", "@radix-ui/react-slot": "1.2.4", "@radix-ui/react-switch": "1.2.6", "@radix-ui/react-tabs": "1.1.13", "@radix-ui/react-toast": "1.2.15", "@radix-ui/react-toggle": "1.1.10", "@radix-ui/react-toggle-group": "1.1.11", "@radix-ui/react-tooltip": "1.2.8", "@supabase/ssr": "^0.9.0", "@supabase/supabase-js": "^2.98.0", "@vercel/analytics": "1.6.1", "autoprefixer": "^10.4.20", "class-variance-authority": "^0.7.1", "clsx": "^2.1.1", "cmdk": "1.1.1", "date-fns": "4.1.0", "embla-carousel-react": "8.6.0", "input-otp": "1.4.2", "lucide-react": "^0.564.0", "next": "16.1.6", "next-themes": "^0.4.6", "react": "19.2.4", "react-day-picker": "9.13.2", "react-dom": "19.2.4", "react-hook-form": "^7.54.1", "react-resizable-panels": "^2.1.7", "recharts": "2.15.0", "sonner": "^1.7.1", "tailwind-merge": "^3.3.1", "vaul": "^1.1.2", "zod": "^3.24.1" }, "devDependencies": { "@tailwindcss/postcss": "^4.2.0", "@types/node": "^22", "@types/react": "19.2.14", "@types/react-dom": "19.2.3", "postcss": "^8.5", "tailwindcss": "^4.2.0", "tw-animate-css": "1.3.3", "typescript": "5.7.3" } }
